name: Yeast Dough Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm the milk to body temperature.
2. Add yeast and stir until completely dissolved.
3. Add sugar, egg, and half of the flour. Mix well.
4. Add soft margarine and enough flour to get a dough that is no longer sticky. Knead well.
5. Let rest for 30 minutes.
6. Knead again and roll thin.
7. This dough is sufficient for two large pies (using a brownie pan).
8. Spread with your choice of filling or jam.
9. Brush the sides with egg and sprinkle coarse sugar on top.
10. Bake in an oven set to 200°C for 30 minutes, or until the sides are golden brown.
Note: For measurement conversion, refer to the FAQ section. Approximately 5 dl equals 2 cups, and 1 kg (1000 g) is about 2.2 pounds.
